features: Moving gravity wells: orbit, oscillate, pulse-mass motion patterns
Power-up system: 4 types (shield, magnet, multi-shot, time-freeze)
Shield absorbs crash with velocity reflection + visual ring particles
Magnet attracts probes toward nearest uncollected target within range
Multi-shot launches 3 probes in a 30-degree fan on trigger release
Time-freeze stops all well movement for 8 seconds
Wormhole portals: paired teleporters with speed boost + cooldown
Screen shake system: exponential decay, triggers on crash/shield/wormhole
Reactive procedural music: melody + harmony layers that intensify with probe count
Twinkling starfield animation (1000 stars, per-star random speed/phase)
Ring particle emission for wormhole transit and shield break effects
8 new achievements (48 total): power-up, shield-save, wormhole, magnet, multi-shot, time-freeze
Power-up HUD panel (15 panels total)
Level generator now places power-ups (level 2+) and wormholes (level 5+)
Chaos mode uses all well motion types; Zen mode has gentle orbit/oscillate
Particle pool expanded to 300 with emitRing method
All 5 preflight checks passed
Zero TypeScript errors confirmed
Production build: 15 uikitml panels compiled
Deployed to GitHub Pages
Source pushed to main branch
